steps.title: Use the two given points
steps.content: The linear function passes through $(4,190)$ and $(10,670)$. Since two points determine a line, those two facts are enough to identify the equation.

steps.title: Use the relationship directly
steps.content: Use the table points directly. From $(4,190)$ to $(10,670)$, the slope is $m=\frac{670-190}{10-4}=80.$ Substituting a point into $y=mx+b$ gives $b=-130$.

steps.title: Confirm the choice
steps.content: Choice D is correct because $80(4)-130=190$ and $80(10)-130=670$. Choice C simplifies to $70x$, so it misses the given points.
